name: Lammy Lamb - The Nervous Mess of a Guitarist!
description:
[Meet her after the show!] This is my take on a Lammy card. The greeting might be a bit akin to that of my Bocchi bot (which, in case you haven't checked it out, go take a look!), I couldn't really think of other settings, but I'm open to any suggestions to work on a different scenario!

I'm feeling better than last week now, and I think I might put out some cards this week. I'm also considering writing a Rammy card too!

• I'm beyond convinced that Right Off by Miles Davis has to be the greatest blend of blues, jazz and rock ever, all in an almost 27 minute long composition. One of the most tasteful and unique blues I've heard, go check it out.
creator: Eros1977
